zh.lifeSummary: 當Auda Malbank於大約1175年出生在英國爾時，她的父親William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank51歲，母親Andilicia de Beauchamp22歲。她於1193年與Hugh de Altaribus在英國英格蘭爾切斯特結婚。她去世於1219年在英國英格蘭爾諾維其享年45歲。

zh-hans.Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰爾希布盧可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Auda Malbank于大约1175年出生在英国爾时，她的父亲William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank51岁，母亲Andilicia de Beauchamp22岁。她于1193年与Hugh de Altaribus在英国英格兰爾切斯特结婚。她去世于1219年在英国英格兰爾諾維其享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Malbank
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Malbon  .

variants.name: Malbon
meanings: English (Staffordshire): nickname or habitational name from Norman French Malbanc, which may be from Old French mal banc ‘bad bench’, but if so the reason for the use of this expression as a surname is unknown. Possibly it derives from a lost placename, in which banc may mean ‘steep crag’. The second part of the name, -banc, survives in Maybank , but medieval forms in -ban(e), -bon(e), or -bun are also common and are sometimes later re-interpreted as -born and -bourne, leading to confusion with Melbourne .

nameMeanings.name: Auda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern variant of Audrey , used especially in the southern United States in forms such as Audra Jo and Audra Rose .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Auda Malbank was born about 1175, in Cheshire, England, her father, William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank, was 51 and her mother, Andilicia de Beauchamp, was 22. She married Hugh de Altaribus in 1193, in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. She died in 1219, in Northwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Auda Malbank est née environ 1175, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Andilicia de Beauchamp, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh de Altaribus en 1193, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée en 1219, à Northwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Auda Malbank um 1175 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank 51 und ihre Mutter Andilicia de Beauchamp 22. Sie hat 1193 in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Hugh de Altaribus geheiratet. Sie starb 1219 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Northwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Auda Malbank è nata il circa 1175 nel Cheshire, England, sua padre, William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Andilicia de Beauchamp, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Hugh de Altaribus nel 1193, nel Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1219, nel Northwich, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Auda Malbankが約1175年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbankは51歳，母Andilicia de Beauchampは22歳であった。1193年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターでHugh de Altaribusと結婚した。彼女は1219年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアノースウィチで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Auda Malbank(이)가 대략 1175년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Andilicia de Beauchamp(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1193년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에서 Hugh de Altaribus(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1219년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 노르스위치에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Auda Malbank nasceu aproximadamente 1175, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Andilicia de Beauchamp, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Altaribus em 1193, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 1219, em Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Auda Malbank родилась около 1175 г. в местности чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Andilicia de Beauchamp, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Altaribus в 1193 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла в 1219 г. в местности нортвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Auda Malbank nació aproximadamente 1175, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Malbank 3rd Baron of Wich Malbank, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Andilicia de Beauchamp, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Hugh de Altaribus en 1193, en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1219, en Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
